entries.name: Search Query Analyzer GPT
entries.description: Analyzes Google search results for content optimization and understanding user search intent for SEO.

entries.name: Is it a Ranking Factor GPT
entries.description: Expert insights into Google's search algorithm factors including page speed, backlinks, and content quality impact.

entries.name: Azure Boards Connector
entries.description: Access Azure DevOps boards, work items, and sprint data within ChatGPT for development workflow management.

entries.name: Teamwork Connector
entries.description: Access Teamwork project management data, tasks, and milestones within ChatGPT.

entries.name: Basecamp Connector
entries.description: Access Basecamp project data, to-dos, and discussions within ChatGPT conversations.

entries.name: Help Scout Connector
entries.description: Access Help Scout customer support tickets and conversations within ChatGPT.

entries.name: OneDrive Connector
entries.description: Access and search Microsoft OneDrive files and documents within ChatGPT.

entries.name: Google Contacts App (Connector)
entries.description: Access and search Google Contacts data within ChatGPT conversations.

entries.name: Outlook Calendar App (Connector)
entries.description: View and manage Outlook calendar events and scheduling within ChatGPT.

entries.name: OpenAI Whisper (Speech-to-Text API)
entries.description: Automatic speech recognition model available via API for transcription and translation of audio content.

entries.name: OpenAI TTS (Text-to-Speech API)
entries.description: Text-to-speech API generating natural-sounding audio in multiple voices for content creation and accessibility.

entries.name: OpenAI Embeddings API
entries.description: Generate text embeddings for semantic search, clustering, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) applications.

entries.name: OpenAI Moderation API
entries.description: Content moderation endpoint for detecting harmful content across categories like violence, hate speech, and self-harm.

entries.name: ChatGPT Enterprise
entries.description: Enterprise-grade ChatGPT deployment with admin console, SSO, domain verification, and advanced security features.

entries.name: ChatGPT Team
entries.description: Team collaboration workspace with shared custom GPTs, higher usage limits, and team-level admin controls.

entries.name: ChatGPT Edu
entries.description: Education-focused ChatGPT tier with group permissions, analytics, and academic integrity features for universities.

entries.name: Math Solver GPT
entries.description: Step-by-step math problem solver covering algebra, calculus, statistics, and advanced mathematics topics.

entries.name: Language Teacher GPT
entries.description: Multilingual language learning assistant with conversation practice, grammar explanations, and vocabulary building.

entries.name: Resume Builder GPT
entries.description: Professional resume and CV creation assistant with formatting, keyword optimization, and ATS-friendly output.

entries.name: API Docs GPT
entries.description: Specialized GPT for generating, explaining, and reviewing API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger support.

entries.name: Prompt Perfect GPT
entries.description: Optimizes and enhances prompts for better AI outputs across ChatGPT, DALL-E, and other models.

entries.name: PDF Analyzer GPT
entries.description: Upload and analyze PDF documents with extraction, summarization, and question-answering capabilities.

entries.name: Diagrams: Show Me GPT
entries.description: Creates diagrams, flowcharts, mind maps, and visual representations from text descriptions using various diagram types.

entries.name: Whimsical Diagrams GPT
entries.description: Generate flowcharts, mind maps, and sequence diagrams with Whimsical's clean visual style directly in ChatGPT.

entries.name: Finance GPT
entries.description: Financial analysis assistant for stock analysis, portfolio management, market trends, and investment research.

entries.name: Tax Helper GPT
entries.description: Tax preparation and planning assistant providing general guidance on deductions, filing, and tax strategies.

entries.name: ChatGPT Desktop App (macOS)
entries.description: Native macOS application with system-wide access, screenshot analysis, and direct integration with desktop workflows.

entries.name: ChatGPT Desktop App (Windows)
entries.description: Native Windows application with Alt+Space shortcut, file analysis, and desktop integration features.

entries.name: ChatGPT iOS App
entries.description: Native iPhone and iPad app with voice mode, image upload, and Siri integration for mobile AI access.

entries.name: ChatGPT Android App
entries.description: Native Android application with voice mode, camera integration, and mobile-optimized ChatGPT experience.

entries.name: GetYourGuide Plugin (Legacy)
entries.description: Plugin for discovering and booking tours, activities, and experiences worldwide. Deprecated April 2024.

entries.name: Podcast Copilot GPT
entries.description: AI assistant for podcast creation including show notes, episode planning, script writing, and SEO optimization.

entries.name: UX Design Mentor GPT
entries.description: UX/UI design assistant providing feedback on wireframes, user flows, and design best practices.

entries.name: Legal GPT
entries.description: Legal research assistant for contract review, legal terminology, case analysis, and regulatory compliance guidance.

entries.name: Medical Advisor GPT
entries.description: Health information assistant providing general medical knowledge, symptom explanations, and wellness guidance (not medical advice).

entries.name: Game Design GPT
entries.description: Game design assistant for mechanics design, level design, narrative systems, balancing, and game development workflows.

entries.name: UnityChatGPT Examples
entries.description: Open-source Unity project demonstrating ChatGPT integration patterns for game developers.

entries.name: Make.com (Integromat) ChatGPT Integration
entries.description: Visual automation platform connecting ChatGPT to hundreds of apps for building automated workflows without code.

entries.name: Midjourney Prompt Generator GPT
entries.description: Specialized GPT for crafting optimized Midjourney prompts with style parameters, aspect ratios, and artistic direction.

entries.name: Stable Diffusion Prompt Maker GPT
entries.description: Creates optimized prompts for Stable Diffusion models with negative prompts, sampling parameters, and model-specific tuning.

entries.name: Docker GPT
entries.description: Docker and containerization assistant for Dockerfile creation, compose files, debugging, and container orchestration.

entries.name: Kubernetes Expert GPT
entries.description: Kubernetes specialist for cluster management, YAML configuration, troubleshooting, and cloud-native architecture.

entries.name: AWS Expert GPT
entries.description: Amazon Web Services specialist for architecture design, service selection, cost optimization, and AWS best practices.

entries.name: Azure Expert GPT
entries.description: Microsoft Azure specialist for cloud architecture, service configuration, and Azure-specific development patterns.

entries.name: Terraform GPT
entries.description: Infrastructure-as-code assistant for writing Terraform configurations, modules, and multi-cloud deployments.

entries.name: Git Expert GPT
entries.description: Git version control specialist for complex branching strategies, conflict resolution, and workflow optimization.

entries.name: React Expert GPT
entries.description: React.js development specialist for component architecture, hooks, state management, and performance optimization.

entries.name: ChatGPT Meeting Recorder
entries.description: Built-in meeting recording feature that captures, transcribes, and summarizes meetings directly in ChatGPT.

entries.name: Company Knowledge (ChatGPT Business)
entries.description: Upload and manage organizational knowledge bases that ChatGPT references across team conversations for consistent answers.

entries.name: Projects (ChatGPT)
entries.description: Organize conversations, files, and custom instructions into projects for focused workstreams and context management.
